changes: Replaced verbose 570-line generic skill with focused 170-line skill targeting CSV analysis with Python
Removed all SQL, visualization, report template, and statistical analysis sections (unused by tasks)
Added explicit CSV Analysis Pattern using Python csv module with deduplication
Added Data Cleaning Pattern with clear order-of-operations: deduplicate first, then count issues on unique rows only
Added Multi-Dataset Analysis Pattern showing how to process multiple CSVs in one script and write all JSON outputs
Added strong guidance: 'count before dedup' means count on unique rows only, not duplicates
Added key rule: 'Do not overthink — write the script and run it immediately' to prevent gemini-3-flash reasoning loops
Removed unused scripts/ directory, _meta.json references, and sample CSV file
